heading: Rules and regulations
label: 425h Rules and regulations
text: The Secretary of the Interior, subject to the approval of the President, shall have the power to make and shall make all needful rules and regulations for the care of the park, and for the establishment and marking of lines of battle and other historical features of the park.
notes: Transfer of FunctionsTransfer of administrative functions of park, see note set out under .section 425 of this title
